name: dex-by-dave
description: Codex-first Dex skill bundle for strategic work management.

interface.longDescription: Dex bundles role-aware skills for meeting intelligence, relationship memory, planning workflows, and onboarding guidance. The full Dex runtime stays repo-local through AGENTS.md, .codex/, and install.sh.
defaultPrompt: Use $onboarding to set up Dex in this repo.
Use $getting-started to walk through the current Dex workspace.
